title.rendered: Building a Community That Builds Your Business

content.rendered:
In this episode of “Marketing In The Now,” join host David Reske and Elizabeth Long, Fractional CMO of LabOps Unite, as they delve into the transformative role of community building in today’s business landscape. Elizabeth brings her wealth of experience to discuss the strategic importance of creating a community that goes beyond marketing, fostering a space for customers, partners, and industry peers to connect, share, and grow together. She outlines the tangible benefits for both community members and organizations, including enhanced peer connections, professional growth, trust building, and invaluable customer insights that drive business growth. 

Don’t miss this episode if you’re looking to build or rejuvenate a community that not only supports its members but also significantly contributes to your business success.
